items.name: Happy Time Glasses 🌼
items.description:
A vibrant and whimsical pair of glasses that exude joy and positivity. With their indigo frames and purple lenses, these stylish glasses are adorned with delicate yellow flower accents on each side. The temples are thoughtfully designed to resemble flower stems, adding an extra touch of elegance. Perfect for embracing sunny days and spreading happiness wherever you go.
